1.title: Hidden Star Fragments
1.storyIntro: Oh no... I can't see anything! My light is gone. It broke into pieces and fell around your home. Can you find them?

cards.hintText: Something warm. Something that gives light. Look where light comes in...
cards.foundText: You found the Sun card! The letter is... S!

cards.hintText: Something tall and strong. It's made of wood. Where do you sit to eat?
cards.foundText: You found the Tree card! The letter is... T!

cards.hintText: Something red and round. Yummy to eat! Look where food stays cool...
cards.foundText: You found the Apple card! The letter is... A!

cards.hintText: Something soft and fluffy. It has long ears. Look on something cozy...
cards.foundText: You found the Rabbit card! The letter is... R!

1.completionText: S-T-A-R! That spells STAR! Twinkle's light is back! ✨

2.title: Color Detective
2.storyIntro: I can see light now... but everything is gray! I need colors. Primary colors first: Red, Blue, and Yellow. Then we can make MORE colors!

colors.promptText: Find something ORANGE in your home!
colors.speechText: Red and yellow make orange! Can you find something orange in your home?

colors.promptText: Find something GREEN in your home!
colors.speechText: Blue and yellow make green! Can you find something green in your home?

colors.promptText: Find something PURPLE in your home!
colors.speechText: Red and blue make purple! Can you find something purple in your home?

2.completionText: Amazing! Now the world has colors! I can see orange, green, and purple! 🌈

3.title: Sound Password
3.storyIntro: I can see colors now, but... I can't hear anything! My sounds are locked in magic jars. Listen carefully... which animal is hiding in each jar?
3.completionText: I can hear! I can hear everything! Woof, meow, tweet, quack, ribbit! 🎵

4.title: Star Dance
4.storyIntro: I can hear sounds now, but... I still can't move! Can you teach me how to dance? I'll copy everything you do!
4.completionText: I can move! Look at me dance! You're the best dance teacher ever! 💃

5.title: Heart of the Star
5.storyIntro: I have light, color, sound, and motion... but there's one more thing I need. The Heart power. Only someone who loves you can give it to me. Will you find them?
5.puzzleMessage: One piece is missing... Ask your Earth Helper for the Heart Piece!
5.plantMessage: Twinkle wants to become a real plant in your world! Earth Helper: give your child a real seed now!
5.certificateSubtext: has completed all 5 Star Seed challenges and helped Twinkle become a real star! The star seed is now growing in your home. Take care of it every day!
5.completionText: We did it! Twinkle is now a real plant in YOUR world! Take good care of it! 🌱✨
